commands.review_summary:
The PR moves `auth credentials set` domain validation and dry-run reporting before keyring/credential writes, adds no-write/no-secret-leak regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main opens/writes credential storage before domain validation and never calls `dryRunExit` in `auth credentials set`. I did not execute the mutating command because the review contract keeps the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the patch appears focused and should proceed through normal PR checks and maintainer review.

target.title: fix(auth): make credential dry-run side-effect free
target.body:
## Summary

- make `auth credentials set --dry-run` emit a redacted plan without opening the keyring or writing credentials/config
- validate all `--domain` values before any credential write
- add no-write and no-secret-leak regression coverage

## Verification

- `go test ./internal/cmd -run 'TestExecute_AuthCredentials_(DryRunDoesNotWriteOrOpenSecretStore|InvalidDomainDoesNotWrite|UsesInjectedStores)$'`
- `make ci`
- structured autoreview: clean
- isolated binary smoke: dry-run wrote zero files; invalid domain exited 1 and wrote zero files
target.author: steipete
